headline: Building an AI-Ready America: Teaching in the AI age

claims.claim: 80% of U.S. K-12 teachers have used AI in their roles or for school-related purposes at least once or twice
claims.evidence: Microsoft official testimony (Feb 24, 2026): 'Our 2025 Study on AI in Education found that 80% of U.S. K-12 teachers have used AI'

claims.claim: One-fifth of K-12 teachers report daily use of AI
claims.evidence: Microsoft testimony: 'and one-fifth report daily use of AI' — 1/5 = 20%

claims.claim: 58% of K-12 teachers believe AI usage at their school/district will increase in the next year
claims.evidence: Microsoft testimony: '58% of K-12 teachers think AI usage at their school/district will increase in the next year'

claims.claim: Roughly one in three teachers lack confidence in using AI effectively and responsibly
claims.evidence: Microsoft testimony: 'We found roughly one in three teachers lack confidence in using AI effectively and responsibly'

claims.claim: There is a significant gap in daily AI usage between urban (39%) and rural teachers (24%)
claims.evidence: Microsoft testimony: 'We have found there's a significant gap in daily AI usage by urban teachers versus their rural and suburban counterparts (39% vs. 24%)'

claims.claim: National Academy for AI Instruction aims to train 400,000 teachers over the next 5 years
claims.evidence: Microsoft testimony: 'Their goal is to train 400,000 teachers over the next 5 years'

concerns.issue: Survey methodology not detailed in article
concerns.detail: Article does not specify sample size, methodology, or margin of error for Microsoft's 2025 AI in Education survey. Only quote-based claims; original full report not cited
All statistics come from Microsoft's own survey. Article should include independent verification from education research organizations (NEA, AFT, etc.) or government data for balance
Article uses 'urban' vs 'rural/suburban' comparison; this conflates rural and suburban categories which may have different AI adoption patterns

draft.headline: 美 교사 80%, AI 이미 사용 중... 신뢰도는 65%
draft.subheadline: Microsoft 조사, 도시-농촌 격차 심각... 교사 교육 시급

audit_log.note: Microsoft 공식 증언 기록 및 2개 추가 교육 전문 소스 검증
전체 신뢰도 81, FLAG — Microsoft 자체 서베이로만 뒷받침, 독립 검증 및 조사 방법론 필요
